howItWorks.intro: This 3d print cost per gram calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Part Cost
rules.formula: Cost = (Spool Price / Weight) × Part Weight + Electricity

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Filament costs $0.02-0.08/gram depending on material. PLA is cheapest.
Electricity, printer depreciation, failed prints, and post-processing time.
